blocker.summary: claude binary not on systemd service PATH -> FileNotFoundError on every spawn -> zero output (0 tool calls, 0 nodes)
blocker.confirmed_cause: claude CLI at /home/bounce/.local/bin/claude (native installer) not on service PATH; shutil.which('claude') returned None, bare-name fallback raised FileNotFoundError. Secondary bug: FileNotFoundError handler returned 3-tuple vs 4-tuple unpack -> run_investigation crash -> zombie running status.
